_about: Local, gitignored reminder registry for the launchd-driven macOS reminder system. Copy this to setup/local/reminders.config.json (the installer does this automatically if it's absent) and edit it there — that path is gitignored, so timing + entries stay machine-local. Re-run setup/reminders/install.sh after changing check_hour/check_minute (they are baked into the launchd plist); changes to the reminders[] list take effect on the next daily run with no reinstall.

reminders.title: Weekly Claude Token Diet
reminders.message: Trim per-session overhead: open an orchestrator session and run /token-diet.

reminders.title: Example monthly reminder
reminders.message: This is what a monthly entry looks like — delete or edit it.

reminders.title: Example every-N-days reminder
reminders.message: Fires every 10 days counted from when it last fired.
